summary: Made a surgical seam pass to reduce repeated handoff material from Chapter 12 at the opening and to carry Elise's bodily aftermath more directly into Chapter 14.
edits: Recast the opening paragraph to enter through Lucien's physical pause and retain the tollhouse/crowd details without re-establishing the scene from scratch.
Kept the opening scaffold distinct from the adjacent visible chapter opening by starting with immediate action rather than post-blast bodily inventory.
Added chalk gritting between Elise's teeth in the closing paragraph to bridge into Chapter 14's first-image injury aftermath.
